{{Fig|A leech alert raised for an [[Glossary:Item|item]] that has already been forgotten 30 times. This makes for an intractable [[Glossary:Leech|leech]] that requires rewording, or using mnemonic techniques. In this case, the user needs to either look for ways to represent proboscis in his memory, or to give up the word altogether, e.g. on the grounds of its low use frequency in English. This particular example comes from a preschooler's [[Glossary:Collection|collection]] and the item can safely be deleted as too advanced, or just delayed by 1-3 years}}
